title: carex × ducellieri
intro: Carex × ducellieri, also known as the hybrid sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex × ducellieri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
